name: research_synthesis
description: Gather, compare, cite, and compress long-horizon research into a useful artifact.
body: Clarify the question, retrieve relevant memory, gather external sources when available, compare claims, cite evidence, and produce a concise synthesis with next actions.

name: tugboat_route
description: Convert a high-level goal into memory retrieval, skill selection, safety checks, and execution steps.
body: Classify the goal, select memory domains, choose skills, check risk, then produce a short executable sequence.

name: security_guardian
body: Check intent, scope, reversibility, permissions, credential exposure, audit trail, and rollback path before allowing action.
